com.mentor.chs.plugin.query

Interface IXCustomResultExpression

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXCustomExpression, IXPlugin, IXResultExpression
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXSBOMContextResultExpression

    public interface IXCustomResultExpression
extends IXCustomExpression, IXResultExpression
    Interface for implementing the Customer Result Expression. A Custom Result Expression returns String Object

    These expressions can be used at different places in Capital, for example for decorating the returned String Object as query result in styling.

    One of the important methods is evaluate(IXObject entity) which returns String (probably based on the IXObject type)

    Example : 

            Object evaluate(IXObject entity) {
                if (entity instanceof IXLogicDiagramObject) {
                        IXDiagram dia = ((IXLogicDiagramObject)entity).getDiagram;
                        return dia.getProperty("P1");
                } else if (entity instance of IXConnectivityObject) {
                        return entity.getAttribute("Name");
                }
                return "";
        }

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.query.IXCustomExpression

        IXCustomExpression.Context
